subcodes.first_line: O My remnant! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My Throne, that My fragrances may draw thee unto the heaven of My loving-kindness and sever thee from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا بقیتی اسمع ندائی عن شطر عرشی لیجذبک نفحاتی الی سماء عنایتی و تنقطعک عما
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
